troubleshooting.title: Plugin Handler Not Triggered
troubleshooting.shortdesc: Resolve cases where plugin action types are present or expected but plugin handlers do not execute.

troublebody.p: Problem: Custom handler logic does not run during execution.

Cause: Plugin is not installed in the active environment, entry-point registration is incorrect, action type mismatch exists between emit_actions(...) and handler action_type, or plugin validation failed.

ul.li: Validate plugin package: python3 -m dita_package_processor plugin validate /path/to/plugin.
Inspect loaded plugins: python3 -m dita_package_processor plugin list.
Inspect plugin details: python3 -m dita_package_processor plugin info com.acme.dita_migration.
Confirm plan contains expected custom action types.
Confirm handler class exports matching action_type and is returned from handlers().
